variants.label: recommended
variants.text: This isn't just a beta, it's a movement of sixty builders shipping usable demos this weekend.

variants.label: variant-a
variants.text: Sixty builders showed up and every single demo went out as a usable link people can open here.

variants.label: variant-b
variants.text: We asked for working demos. Sixty arrived. Here is the complete weekend project recap for all.
